testcase.name: test_invalid_license_plate_async

failure.message: TypeError: AsyncClient.get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'allow_redirects'

testcase.failure:
def test_invalid_license_plate_async(): loop = asyncio.new_event_loop() > dmr_obj = loop.run_until_complete(DMR.get_by_plate_async("GGGGGGG")) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_dmr_methods.py:20: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ dmr/dmr.py:74: in get_by_plate_async data = await scrape_async(license_plate=license_plate) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ dmr/utils/async_scraper.py:21: in scrape_async token, new_url = await get_token(session) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
session = <httpx.AsyncClient object at 0x118633a90>
async def get_token(session) -> Tuple[str, str]: """Get dmrFormToken""" > async with session.get("https://motorregister.skat.dk/dmr-kerne/koeretoejdetaljer/visKoeretoej", headers=get_headers(), allow_redirects=True) as resp: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: AsyncClient.get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'allow_redirects'
dmr/utils/async_scraper.py:10: TypeError

testcase.name: test_dmr_object_normal_car
test_dmr_object_electric_car
test_dmr_object_plugin_hybrid_car
test_dmr_object_hydrogen_car

failure.message: TypeError: AsyncClient.get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'allow_redirects'

testcase.failure:
def test_dmr_object_hydrogen_car(): > dmr, expected = get_object_for_comparison("cy41511", True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

session = <httpx.AsyncClient object at 0x1187d26d0>
async def get_token(session) -> Tuple[str, str]: """Get dmrFormToken""" > async with session.get("https://motorregister.skat.dk/dmr-kerne/koeretoejdetaljer/visKoeretoej", headers=get_headers(), allow_redirects=True) as resp: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: AsyncClient.get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'allow_redirects'

testcase.name: test_dmr_object_motorcycle

failure.message: TypeError: AsyncClient.get() got an unexpected keyword argument 'allow_redirects'
